---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with a plugin
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Plugin

Which plugin is affected?

- [ ] ucp-agentic-commerce
- [ ] acp-agentic-commerce
- [ ] ap2-agentic-payments
- [ ] a2a-multi-agent
- [ ] magento2-commerce
- [ ] webmcp-browser-agents
- [ ] bigcommerce-commerce
- [ ] woocommerce-commerce

## Component

- [ ] Agent (subagent not loading or behaving incorrectly)
- [ ] Skill (skill not invoking or producing wrong output)
- [ ] Hook (hook not firing or blocking incorrectly)
- [ ] Other

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what happened.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Load the plugin: `claude --plugin-dir ./plugin-name`
2. Run: `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or Claude Code output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.x.x]
- Shell: [e.g., bash, zsh, PowerShell]
